## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to refine content strategy and discuss initial research findings for GoodCall's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Initial content clusters (industry guides, best tools, best software) need refinement; "best software" deemed weakest](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Call center/contact center space identified as a key focus area for new content](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Existing content refresh (5 articles/week) to be prioritized alongside new content development](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Team to deepen research on proposed topics, especially query volume and difficulty for call center-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)

## Topics

### Content Cluster Refinement

  - [Initial clusters (industry guides, best tools, best software) discussed](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - ["Best software" cluster deemed weak; focus should be on service-oriented language](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Suggested focus on AI, automation, productivity, and efficiency-related terms](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Proposed new cluster around call center/contact center space](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

### Keyword and Topic Strategies

  - ["Best \[product/service\]" and "alternative to" identified as valuable search patterns](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [City-based keywords (e.g., "AI answering service for \[City\]") proposed for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Scheduling-related keywords noted as a current strength to potentially expand upon](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Call center integration keywords (e.g., "appointment scheduling service for Genesis") suggested for exploration](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

### Existing Content Refresh

  - [5 articles per week to be refreshed as part of the package](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Focus on low-hanging fruit: articles that have dropped in rankings or previously ranked well](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Updates to include new content, keyword opportunities, visuals, FAQ sections, and improved readability](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)
  - [Team to provide a plan of action for content refresh, prioritizing top pages](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2484.0)

### New Content Development

  - [Initial backlog of 109 article topics under review](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Team to continue research based on feedback and explore additional cluster opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Emphasis on experimentation to identify high-potential content areas](https://fathom.video/share/2qCEyMy13edLESyssc-maFs_DJQvZG2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

## Next Steps

1.  GrowthX team to deepen research on proposed topics and clusters, focusing on query volume and difficulty
2.  Develop and share a plan of action for existing content refresh, starting with top priority pages
3.  Begin work on existing content refresh while continuing new content research
4.  Share findings and reports via Slack for asynchronous review
5.  Aim to finalize content clusters and topic selection in the next meeting
6.  Explore possibility of moving future meetings earlier in the day to accommodate team members in different time zones
